sections_cited: section 120 of the Sindh Local Government Act

chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 4389 of 2025 [Muhammad Ahmed Raza Rahim and others vs. POS & others] Petitioners: Muhammad Ahmed Raza Rahim and others through Mr. Altaf Hussain, Advocate. Respondents 1-3: Province of Sindh through Secretary, Local Government Department, through Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Waseem Shamshad Ali, Secretary, Local Government, Karachi. Respondents 4-5: Town Committee Daharki and Town Officer, Town Committee Daharki through Mr. Rafique Ahmed Baloch, Advocate. Date of hearing: 20-11-2025 Date of decision: 20-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – The Secretary, Local Government is present and files compliance report. He states that the complaint of the Petitioners has been forwarded to the Member, Provincial Local Government Commission for conducting enquiry under section 120 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013. With that statement, the purpose of the petition stands served. Disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
